ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Boundary information of the region (e.g., shapefile or GeoJSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsidence_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subsidence factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the subsidence factor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subsidence factor */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subsidence factor */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the subsidence factor (e.g., natural, human-induced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsidence_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data is collected */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the subsidence data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the subsidence data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the subsidence data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the subsidence data */,
  "tectonic" REAL /* Contribution to subsidence due to tectonic movements */,
  "autocompaction" REAL /* Contribution to subsidence due to autocompaction */,
  "isostacy" REAL /* Contribution to subsidence due to isostasy */,
  "settlement" REAL /* Contribution to subsidence due to settlement */,
  "water_extraction" REAL /* Contribution to subsidence due to water extraction */,
  "salt_extraction" REAL /* Contribution to subsidence due to salt extraction */,
  "gas_extraction" REAL /* Contribution to subsidence due to gas extraction */,
  "expected_water_extraction" REAL /* Expected contribution to subsidence due to water extraction */,
  "expected_salt_extraction" REAL /* Expected contribution to subsidence due to salt extraction */,
  "expected_gas_extraction" REAL /* Expected contribution to subsidence due to gas extraction */,
  "subsidence_1890_2017" REAL /* Total subsidence from 1890 to 2017 */,
  "expected_subsidence_2017_2050" REAL /* Expected total subsidence from 2017 to 2050 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsidence_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsidence_factor_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subsidence factor value */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subsidence factor */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the subsidence factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsidence_factor_values_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES subsidence_factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsidence_factor_values_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or affiliation of the user */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the user (e.g., phone number, address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "actions_performed" TEXT /* Actions performed by the user during the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES subsidence_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, shapefile) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV with specific delimiter) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES subsidence_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of the metadata (e.g., data source, data quality) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES subsidence_data ("data_id")
)
